$description: Finance semantics. Live at :root ONLY (built alongside the default bleed primitives) and reference primitives via var() so they ripple when a theme overrides ink/accent. Palette-constrained: bleed maps direction WITHIN its 3 base colors. Direction must ALSO be carried by glyph/weight (see .delta), never color alone — good a11y regardless. A louder theme (see soft.json) may remap these to literal green/red.
